Video.summary: British sailor Edward falls in love with Manuela Cortez against her father's wishes.
Video.title: Ship of No Return

Video.summary: The unexpected arrival of men from Rose's criminal past threatens her happiness.
Video.title: Thorn of the Rose

Video.summary: A salesman gets an unusual assignment: find the buyer of a custom-made silver piano.
Video.title: A Piano Goes West

Video.summary: A captain tries to clear a trading post owner accused of selling ammunition to the enemy.
Video.title: A Bullet for the Captain

Video.summary: Innocent John Studebaker's high hopes are quickly punctured when he loses his wagon and his savings.
Video.title: Wheelbarrow Johnny

Video.summary: A white man who lives among Native tribes tries to foil a plot to steal gold claims from their land.
Video.title: The Blond King

Video.summary: Justin Gates must save a boy deathly ill after swallowing a concoction offered by a medicine man.
Video.title: Rx Slow Death

Video.summary: A notorious Apache is in the area and a local captain's son is missing.
Video.title: The Little Trooper

Video.summary: When artistic Billy Jackson is threatened by gunslinger Corbett, he shoots him in the back.
Video.title: The Reluctant Gun

Video.summary: A reformed criminal's former partners in crime come calling after robbing a bank.
Video.title: The Devil's Due

Video.summary: A couple face opposition to their marriage, the governor of California.
Video.title: Forbidden Wedding

Video.summary: A drifter befriends a boy whose father has been jailed for horse theft.
Video.title: The Man on the Road

Video.summary: America's first female judge loses her life savings and her husband in a fight against corruption.
Video.title: A Woman's Rights

Video.summary: A widow's ranch is requisitioned by the Union Army, making her the target of Confederate cavalrymen.
Video.title: Splinter Station

Video.summary: As the Donner Party attempts to cross the Sierra Nevada Mountains, and the Reed family is banished.
Video.title: A Girl Named Virginia

Video.summary: The Salt War erupts when a rancher decides to sell salt that used to be free.
Video.title: The Salt War

Video.summary: Matt Denby faces severe bad luck: his son is bitten by a rabid animal and his wife leaves him.
Video.title: The Madstone

Video.summary: A tenderfoot teams with a prospector who is quick to live up to his reputation as a jinx.
Video.title: Gamble with Death

Video.summary: Dr. Allen Camden investigates the murder of likeable shopkeeper Grant Noble.
Video.title: Dead Man's Tale

Video.summary: A campaign to annex Oregon Territory.
Video.title: Who's Fer Divide?

Video.summary: A group of religious settlers tangles with outlaws who have set up an illegal tollgate.
Video.title: Dangerous Crossing

Video.summary: A female patriot meets an outlaw.
Video.title: General Without a Cause

Video.summary: A Navy officer mapping the Missouri River encounters a struggle between Indians and the Army.
Video.title: Sailor on a Horse

Video.summary: A vagabond finds stolen riches and becomes a philanthropist.
Video.title: Money to Burn

Video.summary: Townspeople unite against a couple who refuse to carry guns and fight.
Video.title: Devil's Bar

Video.summary: An ex-con tries to prevent the son he gave up for adoption from following in his steps.
Video.title: The Young Gun

Video.summary: Impoverished homesteader Aaron makes a discovery with the potential to earn a fortune.
Video.title: Green Is the Color of Gold

Image.alt: Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold

Video.summary: Jesse Martin stirs up a town: he claims there's a payload of gold lying right beneath Main Street.
Video.title: Gold Mine on Main Street

Video.summary: Wagonmaster Lassen faces an unruly mob when he tries a new route to California in the 1840s.
Video.title: The Other Side of the Mountain

Image.alt: The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain

Video.summary: An Irish miner hopes a man named Ben will help him find gold after Ben demonstrates magical powers.
Video.title: The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch

Image.alt: The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch

Video.summary: Sandy King, the youngest member of an outlaw gang, is wounded.
Video.title: A Mule... Like the Army's Mule

Image.alt: A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule

Video.summary: John Slaughter's deputy poses a problem: the maverick is prone to violence and accepting bribes.
Video.title: A Shortcut Through Tombstone

Video.summary: A frontier couple battle Natives, outlaws and a government-issued land grant to save their ranch.
Video.title: Here Stands Bailey

Video.summary: A convict is released from prison, but not released from his past.
Video.title: Tracy's Triumph

Video.summary: A peace-seeking Native scout aids pioneers besieged by Native renegades.
Video.title: The Visitor

Video.summary: A trouble-shooter must establish a mail route in bandit country.
Video.title: The King of Uvalde Road

Video.summary: A young man hunts for gold, hoping to impress his girl so she'll accept his proposal.
Video.title: The Mezcla Man

Video.summary: A gambler is determined to collect his poker winnings: half of Tombstone, Arizona.
Video.title: The Duke of Tombstone

Video.summary: Gold fever takes hold when Nellie learns that nuggets just lay on the ground in a remote area.
Video.title: The Angel of Tombstone

Video.summary: An old thief outwits lawmen by returning to his rundown shack on the U.S.-Republic of Texas border.
Video.title: Old Stape

Video.summary: Red Eagle and Little Fawn fight an unscrupulous businessman to secure an army freight contract.
Video.title: The Contract
